ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the event (e.g., Workshop, News) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the event (e.g., One-time, Recurring) */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject or title of the event */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author or creator of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the event was created */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views or hits the event has received */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is taking place */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees */,
  "registration_open" INTEGER /* Indicates if registration is open */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event attended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the event */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date when the user attended the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., registered, attended, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., attendee, organizer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the event (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review has been approved by a moderator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tags_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the photo was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the photo was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_photos_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the video was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the video was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_videos_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was written */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been approved by a moderator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the revision was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_revisions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_revisions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
